description_long: This group of five adult pedestrians is depicted wearing casual athletic outfits, each consisting of a t-shirt, fitted athletic pants, and sneakers. All individuals are accessorized with wide-brimmed hats, adding a distinctive flair to their appearance. The t-shirts feature different colors and patterns, including stripes and solid designs, with visible numbers on the back, suggesting a sports or team theme. The figures are standing upright, with relaxed postures and arms at their sides. The overall build and proportions are consistent with adult males, and the clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing an active, urban lifestyle. No additional objects are carried, and the footwear is designed for comfort and mobility.
description: A group of five adult males in casual athletic wear and wide-brimmed hats, each with a numbered t-shirt and fitted pants, standing upright in a relaxed pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing five adults in various colored t-shirts, fitted pants, sneakers, and wide-brimmed hats, with visible shirt designs and relaxed stances.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the figures, showing the hats' brims and the slim fit of the pants and shirts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the t-shirts with large numbers, the fit of the pants, and the hats' full brims.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile, emphasizing the hats and the athletic cut of the outfits.
attribute_clothing_type: casual athletic t-shirt, fitted athletic pants, wide-brimmed hat
